value.sampling_method: a single reading from each of 20 different large cars

carbon_monoxide_large_cars.description: Carbon monoxide concentration readings from the exhausts of large cars, one reading per car from 20 different large cars.

value.sampling_method: a single reading from each of 20 different small cars

carbon_monoxide_small_cars.description: Carbon monoxide concentration readings from the exhausts of small cars, one reading per car from 20 different small cars.

car_size.description: Size category of the car (large or small), the grouping factor for comparing carbon monoxide emissions.
